title: Contact
intro: Have a question about an order, need help with something, or just want to get in touch? Reach out however works best for you.

phoneCard.fallbackNote: Phone number not yet set. Update contact.json to add it.
phoneCard.copy: Phone is the best way to reach Patty. If she's unavailable, leave a message and she'll call back.

formToggleText: Prefer to write? Send a message
